findings.description: `ThreadContextHandler` appears in the handler queue ordering configuration in s2 content but is absent from s2 hints. Users looking up HTTPアクセスログ handler setup in relation to ThreadContextHandler would not find this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 'ThreadContextHandler ↓ HttpAccessLogHandler ↓ NablarchTagHandler ↓ HttpRequestJavaPackageMapping' — this is the required handler queue order shown in s2
